intended_use: Transpara® software is intended for use as a concurrent reading aid for physicians interpreting screening full-field digital mammography exams and digital breast tomosynthesis exams from compatible FF
intended_use_full: Transpara® software is intended for use as a concurrent reading aid for physicians interpreting screening full-field digital mammography exams and digital breast tomosynthesis exams from compatible FFDM and DBT systems, to identify regions suspicious for breast cancer and assess their likelihood of malignancy.
ground_truth: biopsy-proven examples; normal exams had at least one year follow-up
other_metrics: False positive rate: 0.30 FP/image for 2D, 0.34 FP/volume for DBT
